title: When should yosys be generating extended eblif attributes?
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

Running the following verilog file through Yosys;
```verilog
// 4-input LUT test.
module top(input [3:0] I, output O);
    always @(I)
    case(I)
        4'b1000 : O = 1;
        4'b1001 : O = 1;
        4'b1010 : O = 1;
        4'b1100 : O = 1;
        4'b1110 : O = 1;
        4'b1111 : O = 1;
        default : O = 0;
    endcase
endmodule // top
```

With the following command `synth_ice40; ice40_opt -unlut; abc -lut 4; opt_clean; write_blif -attr -cname -conn -impltf -param vlut.eblif` you get;
```blif
# Generated by Yosys 0.7+501 (git sha1 588ce0e3, x86_64-conda_cos6-linux-gnu-gcc 8a21ab48 -fPIC -Os)

.model top
.inputs I[0] I[1] I[2] I[3]
.outputs O
.names I[3] I[2] I[1] I[0] O
1000 1
1001 1
1010 1
1100 1
1110 1
1111 1
.end
```

If you instead use the following command `synth_ice40; write_blif -attr -cname -conn -impltf -param vlut.eblif` you get;
```blif
# Generated by Yosys 0.7+501 (git sha1 588ce0e3, x86_64-conda_cos6-linux-gnu-gcc 8a21ab48 -fPIC -Os)

.model top
.inputs I[0] I[1] I[2] I[3]
.outputs O
.subckt SB_LUT4 I0=I[0] I1=I[1] I2=I[2] I3=I[3] O=O
.cname $abc$173$auto$blifparse.cc:465:parse_blif$174
.param LUT_INIT 1101011100000000
.end
```

## Expected behavior

I would have expected a `.cname` for the `.names` in the first example?

I would have also expected in both cases something which documents where in the Verilog file this lut comes from?
code_blocks:
# Generated by Yosys 0.7+501 (git sha1 588ce0e3, x86_64-conda_cos6-linux-gnu-gcc 8a21ab48 -fPIC -Os)

.model top
.inputs I[0] I[1] I[2] I[3]
.outputs O
.names I[3] I[2] I[1] I[0] O
1000 1
1001 1
1010 1
1100 1
1110 1
1111 1
.end

# Generated by Yosys 0.7+501 (git sha1 588ce0e3, x86_64-conda_cos6-linux-gnu-gcc 8a21ab48 -fPIC -Os)

.model top
.inputs I[0] I[1] I[2] I[3]
.outputs O
.subckt SB_LUT4 I0=I[0] I1=I[1] I2=I[2] I3=I[3] O=O
.cname $abc$173$auto$blifparse.cc:465:parse_blif$174
.param LUT_INIT 1101011100000000
.end
